title: BEM-865 queue processing check5
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
result_file = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in lines
result_text = result_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if result_file.exists() else ''
if ok:
    status = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK'
elif result_file.exists() and 'DISPATCHED' in result_text:
    status = 'DISPATCHED_WAITING_CLAUDE_WRITE'
elif result_file.exists() and 'DISPATCH_FAILED' in result_text:
    status = 'DISPATCH_FAILED'
elif processed.exists():
    status = 'QUEUE_PROCESSED_NO_RESULT_FILE'
elif queue.exists():
    status = 'QUEUE_STILL_PENDING_AFTER_WAKEUP2'
else:
    status = 'QUEUE_MISSING'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_QUEUE_PROCESSING_CHECK5_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 queue processing check5\nStatus: ' + status + '\nQueue exists: ' + str(queue.exists()) + '\nProcessed exists: ' + str(processed.exists()) + '\nResult file exists: ' + str(result_file.exists()) + '\nClaude write OK: ' + str(ok) + '\nResult text prefix:\n' + result_text[:1000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('queue processing check5: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
